_schema: PMS-R3 search profiles -- declared candidate space (workload x role x quant x shape x target x route_family). The manifest-driven candidate generator (extra/qk_pure_search_next_candidate.py --profile-driven) draws candidates ONLY from here. It REFUSES any candidate whose route_family is not declared allowed for the requested role (REFUSED_OUT_OF_PROFILE), refuses any (role,route_family) carried in do_not_search (REFUSED_DO_NOT_SEARCH), and when asked for the next untried candidate it emits NO_UNTRIED_CANDIDATE_TARGETS_A_FAILED_ROW rather than wandering into already-promoted/shipped roles. A role is a SEARCHABLE failed/open row only if its status is open|failed (not promoted|shipped|refuted).
generated_by: PMS-R3; route status + do_not_search synced from extra/qk_route_manifest.py (ROUTES + REFUTED)
_route_families_note: lanemap/coop/graph_gemm_pipe/native_isa_attention/owned_reference are the GENERIC families a live route uses. lanemap_layout_reshuffle and coop_halfwarp_direct are the refuted SUB-variant tokens used only by do_not_search, so a refuted topology never shadows a generic family that a promoted/shipped route still uses (e.g. ffn_gate_up=lanemap is PROMOTED; the refuted offline-reshuffle is a distinct token).

status_vocab.promoted: generated/search-selected route is the shipped default for this role (no open search)
status_vocab.shipped: owned/hand route is the shipped default for this role (no generated replacement promoted; not an open search target unless a ceiling audit reopens it)
status_vocab.shipped_owned: owned route shipped; a generated alt exists but is correct_not_fast (research, not a failed-row search target)
status_vocab.refuted: a candidate was built+measured and lost; do not re-search as built
status_vocab.open: no promoted/shipped route yet -> a searchable failed/open row
status_vocab.failed: a tracked candidate row failed its gate and the role still needs a route -> searchable

ffn_gate_up.pipe_exclude_reason: out_f==12288 is BLAS-saturated (~107% of BLAS on lds2); pipe regresses it ~17% -> kept on lds2

do_not_search.disposition: deprioritized: G3 (generic lanemap) matches owned; the refuted axis is the OFFLINE LAYOUT RESHUFFLE variant, not the promoted lanemap route
exhausted/low-leverage (combine overlaps in-graph; fused is codegen-walled)
